---
title: "Radio Frequency (E157) Projects"
toc: false
format: html
---


```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p>This Fall 2026, I will take an upper division  engineering elective, <a href="https://catalog.hmc.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=8532" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  E157: RF Circuit Design</a> at Harvey Mudd College. In this course I will design and characterize RF circuits including filters, impedance matching networks, and antennas. Along the way, I will gain experience with transmission line theory, S-parameter measurement using a VNA, and building a receiver to decode a live RF signal. Check out my work below!
    </p>
```

## Lab Certification & LtSpice (Lab 1)

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Transmission Line Time Responses (Lab 2)

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## VNA Calibration and De-Embedding (Lab 3)

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Design Project 1: Filter

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Near Field Measurements (Lab 4)

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Antenna Characterization (Lab 5)

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Design Project 2: Communication System 

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 1em;">
  <div style="flex: 2; min-width: 300px;">
    <p><strong>Overview:</strong><br><em>Coming Soon!</em></p>
  </div>
</div>
```
